shot.type: slow tracking dolly along the 60-foot long axis, ground level
shot.camera: slow tracking dolly, locked horizon, subtle gimbal
shot.lens: 24mm wide transitioning to 35mm feel as push-in progresses
shot.framing: eye-level, emphasizing the narrower elongated polygon proportion horizontally
shot.motion: steady 1.5 m/s forward along the long axis, no arc, straight push reveal

subject: Anna's Farm Site Two — 1500 sqft irregular polygon residential common-space entry area, Front Range xeriscape installation reveal
context: Lafayette Colorado suburban Front Range, Boulder County. Narrower elongated polygon footprint. Tan decomposed granite ground, four warm-ochre sandstone boulders in a 3+1 asymmetric composition, buff Lyons sandstone flagstone stepping groupings, rust-ochre rip-rap accent line along the long edge, ten matte-black solar path lights in a rhythmic straight line parallel to the long axis.
action: Camera starts at the empty dirt before-state and pushes along the long axis. Decomposed granite fills in underfoot; four boulders settle into place in the 3+1 composition; flagstone clusters appear as low stepping groupings; the rust rip-rap accent line traces along the far edge like a ribbon; the ten solar path lights activate in rhythmic sequence from near to far as the sun drops to golden hour in the final frame and warm rim-light catches the hero boulder cluster.

environment.time_of_day: midday to golden hour over 8 seconds
environment.weather: clear sky, light Front Range breeze

lighting: Neutral midday ramping to low golden-hour raking light from camera back-right with long shadows. Solar path lights activate in a rhythmic near-to-far sequence in the final two seconds.
style: photorealistic architectural visualization, cinematic reveal, seamless morph, warm and clean
color_palette: tan decomposed granite, rust ochre rip-rap, warm sandstone boulders, buff Lyons sandstone flagstone, warm 2700K path lights, cobalt shadows
composition: long-axis tracking push with rhythmic path-light cadence as the visual beat
ambiance: clean, professional, inviting, HOA-appropriate, Colorado modern

audio.ambient: soft Front Range breeze with a steady bed, faint distant traffic, mourning dove call at 4 seconds
audio.foley: subtle stone-settle thuds as boulders land, granular shuffle as decomposed granite fills in, rhythmic soft chimes as the ten path lights activate near to far in the final two seconds
audio.music: warm minimal strings pad, rising gently, matching the rhythmic path-light activation in the final beats, no percussion

negative_prompt: people, construction workers, vehicles, trucks, text overlays, watermark, logos, cartoon style, oversaturation, lens flare starbursts, grass lawn, tropical plants, HDR halos
